content.text: Added the missing `UserForm` constructor to the Form implementation example in `s1`, placing it after the field declarations and before the setter methods, matching the source order. The constructor shows the Nablarch-specific pattern for binding request parameters (`Map<String, Object> params`) to form fields including the `UserEntity` cast.
